gitCommit.subject: 🐛 Fix file picker triggered by clicking on import tab
gitCommit.body:
🐛 Fix file picker triggered by clicking on import tab

Closes #675

See https://github.com/simonwep/viselect/pull/254

Introduced by 0930690c3b6fe0ced30a90671c282e533c325f2c in #635

gitCommit.subject: 🐛 Fix file picker triggered by clicking on import tab
gitCommit.body:
🐛 Fix file picker triggered by clicking on import tab

Closes #675

See https://github.com/simonwep/viselect/pull/254

Introduced by 0930690c3b6fe0ced30a90671c282e533c325f2c in #635

specs.title: allows cancelling classification of an observation
when observation has no crop box
